rationale: Tests if deceleration in high-yield credit-spread widening marks reliable macro bottoms for leveraged tech assets.
expected_failure_mode: Spreads can plateau at elevated levels during prolonged recessions, causing premature entries.
stop_conditions: targeted window still fails after timing repair
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Drawdown during 2022 exceeds buy-and-hold drawdown by more than 5%.
Signal fails to trigger within 15 days of major historical troughs.
